scripts.build:listener: powershell -Command "if (Get-Process -Name 'clipboard-listener' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Stop-Process -Name 'clipboard-listener' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Get-Process -Name 'paster' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Stop-Process -Name 'paster' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0" && C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v4.0.30319\csc.exe /target:exe /out:electron\clipboard-listener.exe electron\clipboard-listener.cs && C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v4.0.30319\csc.exe /target:exe /out:electron\paster.exe electron\paster.cs && C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v4.0.30319\csc.exe /target:winexe /out:electron\launcher.exe electron\launcher.cs && C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v4.0.30319\csc.exe /target:exe /out:electron\watchdog-service.exe /reference:C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v4.0.30319\System.ServiceProcess.dll electron\watchdog-service.cs && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path out\main) { Copy-Item -Path electron\clipboard-listener.exe -Destination out\main\clipboard-listener.exe -Force; Copy-Item -Path electron\paster.exe -Destination out\main\paster.exe -Force; Copy-Item -Path electron\launcher.exe -Destination out\main\launcher.exe -Force; Copy-Item -Path electron\watchdog-service.exe -Destination out\main\watchdog-service.exe -Force }; exit 0"
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis && npm run optimize
scripts.dist:portable: npm run clean && npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable && npm run optimize
scripts.dist:dir: npm run clean && npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --dir && npm run optimize
